/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/input-method-unstable-v1-protocol.c.o" "CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/home/truonghieu/Downloads/Uk362/keyhook/vietkey.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/home/truonghieu/Downloads/Uk362/newkey/encode.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/home/truonghieu/Downloads/Uk362/vnconv/convert.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/home/truonghieu/Downloads/Uk362/vnconv/charset.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/home/truonghieu/Downloads/Uk362/vnconv/data.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/home/truonghieu/Downloads/Uk362/vnconv/pattern.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/home/truonghieu/Downloads/Uk362/byteio/byteio.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/src/ukengine_wrapper.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/uk-wayland-im.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o uk-wayland-im  -lwayland-client -lm -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
